name: Blazing Cartesia, the Virtuous
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>赫</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>あか</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>聖</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>せい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>女</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じょ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>カルテシア
desc: If you have "Fallen of Albaz" in your field or GY: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. During the Main Phase (Quick Effect): You can Fusion Summon 1 Level 8 or higher Fusion Monster from your Extra Deck, using monsters from your hand or field. During the End Phase, if a Fusion Monster(s) was sent to your GY this turn: You can add this card from the GY to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Blazing Cartesia, the Virtuous" once per turn.
